behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names SchedulingSpec, areal/api/cli_args.py, ray_placement_strategy field, valid values shared/separate/deferred, default 'shared', ValueError with field name, AGENTS.md rules about wildcard imports, Literal cleanup, print(), and ruff formatting.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (OmegaConf works, ValueError raised with field name, valid values accepted, Literal removed if unused) — alternative fixes (str + validator, Enum-based approach with str alias) would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests instantiate SchedulingSpec, call OmegaConf.structured, do roundtrip yaml, and run subprocess for ruff/pytest.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived, Repo CI/CD) and tagged with [pr_diff]/[agent_config]/[repo_tests].
